user.title: Zigbee2MQTT connection
user.description: Connect to your Zigbee2MQTT bridge via MQTT.

telegram.title: Telegram notifications
telegram.description: Alerts are sent via the Home Assistant Telegram Bot integration. Leave empty to disable Telegram alerts.

error.mqtt_not_configured: The MQTT integration is not set up in Home Assistant.
error.invalid_chat_id: Chat ID must be a number (it may start with a minus sign).

abort.already_configured: This Zigbee2MQTT base topic is already configured.

data.alert_device_silent_24h: Alert: device silent for too long
data.alert_device_removed: Alert: device removed from the network
data.alert_device_not_in_ha: Alert: device not found in Home Assistant (MQTT)
data.alert_device_ha_mismatch: Alert: Z2M / Home Assistant status mismatch
data.alert_network_stale: Alert: no MQTT from any device (network stale)
data.silent_threshold_hours: Hours of silence before a device is reported

error.invalid_chat_id: Chat ID must be a number (it may start with a minus sign).
